name: Knoll Modern Shed Plan - 14x14 Monoslope Roof Studio Shed | DIY Backyard Office & Workshop PDF Plans
open_features: A clean single-slope roof design delivers contemporary architecture while allowing efficient water drainage and a taller interior wall for added headroom.
Straightforward framing methods and standard lumber sizes make the Knoll shed ideal for both beginner builders and experienced DIYers.
Balanced door and window placements allow for easy access, abundant natural light, and comfortable airflow throughout the interior.
Horizontal wood siding, minimal trim lines, and the modern lean-to roof create a sleek backyard structure with timeless architectural appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Knoll Modern Shed - a stylish 14x14 monoslope roof backyard studio designed for efficiency, versatility, and clean architectural simplicity. Featuring a sleek single-slope roofline, warm horizontal siding potential, and crisp contemporary geometry, Knoll delivers a refined exterior with highly flexible interior possibilities.
